name: io.github.freeappstore-online/mcp
description: AI agent tools for FreeAppStore: create, build, deploy, and inspect PWA apps. Two build modes: write code yourself (create_app + update_files) or prompt the VibeCode agent (agent_build).

tools.name: create_app
tools.description: Create + publish a new app: provision repo/hosting/listing, scaffold a template, deploy live at <id>.freeappstore.online

tools.name: update_files
tools.description: Write/overwrite files in an app you own; auto-redeploys in ~30-60s

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from an app's repo

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in an app's repo

tools.name: agent_build
tools.description: Hand a prompt to the VibeCode agent; it writes the code and deploys it (uses your vaulted AI key)

tools.name: agent_status
tools.description: Poll an agent_build session for app id, deploy phase, live URL

tools.name: app_info
tools.description: Get an app's live URL, repo, store listing, status

tools.name: deploy_status
tools.description: Check recent GitHub Actions deploy runs for an app

tools.name: app_logs
tools.description: Recent errors/warnings/SDK calls/build info for an app you own

tools.name: platform_guide
tools.description: Fetch the full SKILLS.md platform guide

tools.name: sdk_reference
tools.description: Quick @freeappstore/sdk reference (auth, kv, counters, collections, rooms, proxy, keys, ui)
